rationale: All four claimed consult-only contradictions are baseline-present or baseline-weak.
No consultation response contains Alzheimer-specific recovered contradictions or public Alzheimer source IDs.
The consult prompts themselves name the alleged recovery directions, creating request-side leakage.
The contradiction count is inflated by uncertainty, semantic relabeling, duplicate clusters, and contradiction splitting.
The atlas remains a useful second-pass uncertainty map, but it does not survive as evidence of consultation-caused contradiction recovery.
